raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tannis Deenas rakstija
arridsan dauds Augstneeki ne
Juhda fawas Grahimatas/ tahs
tappe us Tobijafu fuhtitas/ un
Tobijas fuhtija atkaž pee teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo dauds eekſch Juhda
biſa winnam ſwehrejschi/ tapehz/
ka tas weens Snohts Sakant-
juſ bija/ ta Dehla Arus/ un winx-
na Dehls Joanans bij apzehmts
to Meitu Mesullama / ta Deh-
la Berekiuns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee runnaja arridsan no
winna Labdarritchanas mannâ
Preekſchâ/ un mannuſ Wahr-
dus noneſte tee pee winna / tad
fuhtija Tobijas Grahmatas/ ka
tas manni iſbaiſotu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nu tas Muhrts bij
ustaisihts/ tad eezehtu
es tahs Durwis/ un tee
Wahrts-Sargt/ un tee Dseedatji/ un tee Lewitti tappe eezehti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es pawehleju manniam
Brahtam Ananum/ un Anani-
jafam tam Wirſneekam pahr
Jerusalemes Pilli/ (jo tas bija
weens ustizzige Wihrs/ un Dee-
wabihjtigs pahr daudseem.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fazziju us teem:
Laid Jerusalemes Wahrtis ne
tohp atvarritas/ kamehr ta Sau-
le ceſift/ un kad tee tur wehl
klaht irraid/ tad laid attat tahs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu bija tas Pilsfa
plats un leels/ un to Kauschu
ja mas eekſch ta/ un tee Nam-
ne bija uſtaisiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad dewe mans De-
manna Sirdi/ ka es tohs Au-
neeks/ un Waldneekus/ unt
Landis ſapulzinaju / tohs D-
dus lihdſinaht. Un es atrai-
weenu Grahmatu / to Ra-
Lihdſinaschanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No teein/ kas pirinâ R-
tâ bij augſcham nahkuschi /
es atraddu eekſch ta ta rakſt-
Schee irr tahs Walstas B-
nt/ kas bij us augſchu nahku-
no tahs Aistweschanas Zeetu-
ko Nebukadnezars / tas d-
ninsch no Babels bij aistwed-
Un kas atgreesuſchees irr us-
rusalemi/ un us Juhdu/ it-
fawa Pilsſahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas ar Serubabelu na-
Jesüü/ Neemiju/ Asartju/ D-
miju / Naemanu / Mardok-
Bilsanu/Misperetu/ Rigew-
Neimu/ Baenu. Schis ir-
Pulke to Wibru / to Isr-
Yanschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pareofa Behrni bija
tuhkſtoſcht/ ſimts/ ſeptindeſ-
un diwi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sewattius Behrni/ t-
ſimts/ ſeptindeſimis un din-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
